This note receives the cross-boundary wikilink from
`projects/example/boundary-note`.

Check 3 of `checks.md` requires that opening this note and viewing its
Backlinks panel shows `projects/example/boundary-note` as a linked mention.
If Obsidian's backlink index can resolve links that originate inside a
symlinked subtree, this note is in the index.
